summary: This document is a deprecated CSV file containing synthetic dialogue chunks from an AI phone agent designed for NHS GP practices. It includes sample conversational turns where the agent asks about symptoms, offers follow-ups, and references GDPR compliance. The data appears to be cached messages from an ElevenLabs integration used for testing or training the voice agent.
